message:
fix: installer false Python detection and remove phantom threads table

Two bugs fixed:

1. (#87) Installer falsely detects own Rust binary as legacy Python.
   Added is_likely_python_binary() that checks file magic bytes (ELF,
   Mach-O, PE, shebang) before offering migration. If the installed
   binary is already a native executable, migration markers are cleared.

2. (#88) Readiness check expects non-existent "threads" table, causing
   serve-http to degrade to 503 after doctor reconstruct. Removed
   "threads" from required tables list in readiness check, doctor
   check, and identity health check — it was never part of the schema.

Closes #87, closes #88

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
